name: Tomatoes a La Provencale/Baked Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 8 ripe, round tomatoes, cored and halved
a handful of flat-leaf parsley, finely minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Arrange tomatoes cut side up in a large baking dish.
3. Season generously with salt and pepper.
4. Slice the garlic into thin chips and sprinkle over tomatoes.
5. Combine bread crumbs and parsley and scatter over tomatoes.
6. Drizzle with oil.
7. Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour or until tomatoes are soft, browned and sizzling.
8. Serve immediately.
